data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of randomizing hidden slots to avoid patterns. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate the existence of an algorithm that implements this randomization. The linked use case describes a scenario where the coach sets hiding percentages but lacks any mention of a mechanism to randomize the hidden slots, indicating a clear gap in functionality.
gaps: No evidence of an algorithm that randomizes which slots are hidden.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
